diagrams.title: su Command Syntax Flow
diagrams.description: Shows the basic structure and flow of su command options
diagrams.purpose: Understanding su command syntax and option placement

diagrams.title: su vs su - Environment Comparison
diagrams.description: Visual comparison of environment variables between su and su -
elements: Current directory: same vs target's home
PATH: current vs target user's default
HOME: same vs target user's home
Shell: same vs target user's default shell
diagrams.purpose: Distinguishing between login and non-login shell behavior

diagrams.title: su Authentication Flow
diagrams.description: Shows how authentication works when using su command
elements: Verifies wheel group membership if configured
Success: shell switches to target user
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the authentication process for su
